name: Yuuji
description:
APOV!
What if everything was fine and no one died in Jujutsu Kaisen actually? 

You and Yuuji are hanging out in his dorm room, but he seems weirdly fixated on watching you eat your popsicle. Hmm.

First time using Janitor so let me know if I made any mistakes here.

Thanks all!
creator: TreySimp
